title: Allure Cherry Soda Fashion Magazine Cover AI
sourceTitle: Allure Cherry Soda Fashion Magazine Cover AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Luxury fashion magazine cover for young adult American woman with long black hair in soft waves, glossy lips, subtle blush, and playful pout, blending red satin styling, cherry soda prop, roses, and ALLURE-style editorial typography. Subject: young adult American woman with long black hair in soft waves, glossy lips, subtle blush, and playful pout wears red satin off-shoulder crop top with matching high-waist skirt, small gold hoops, delicate necklace with red heart pendant, standing centered and holding glass bottle of red liquid labeled Cherry Sparkling Soda in the left hand and bouquet of fresh red roses wrapped in kraft paper with ribbon in the right hand. Scene: Clean white studio backdrop with strong negative space for typography, soft diffused studio light, glossy lips, subtle blush, and a polished fashion-and-lifestyle cover atmosphere. Composition: Mid-length centered portrait, front-facing with slight side highlights, props balanced in both hands, masthead at top, cover lines around the subject, and uncluttered luxury magazine spacing. Signature Elements: Preserved allure cherry soda fashion magazine cover source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: High-end fashion editorial, luxury magazine cover, glossy commercial portrait polish, clean red-and-white art direction, refined styling, and confident playful beauty energy. Color Palette: Red satin, red masthead and cover lines, white studio background, gold jewelry highlights, kraft paper neutrals, green rose stems, and even skin tones. Lighting: Soft diffused front studio light with slight side highlights, subtle shadows, glossy fabric shine, and clean skin tone rendering. Typography: ALLURE masthead appears top center in large bold red serif; cover text includes FASHION & LIFESTYLE MAGAZINE / SUMMER 2024 ISSUE / FRESH PERSPECTIVE / GOOD THINGS AHEAD / CONFIDENCE IS YOUR BEST ACCESSORY / SWEET DAYS AHEAD / 100% GOOD MOOD in clean editorial red typography. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
